title: Crunchy Italian Onion Calzone
description: A midnight craving Italian dish featuring onion rings and Mediterranean friendly ingredients, this calzone is a funky twist on traditional Italian cuisine. It is a shaggy, satisfying meal that is perfect for a late night snack.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 425 degrees Fahrenheit.
Roll out the pizza dough to a thickness of about 1/4 inch.
Spread the tomato sauce over the center of the dough, leaving a 1 inch border around the edges.
Top the sauce with the mozzarella cheese, onion rings, garlic, salt, and pepper.
Fold the dough over the filling to form a half circle shape, pressing the edges to seal.
Brush the top of the calzone with olive oil and sprinkle with chopped basil.
Place the calzone on a baking sheet and bake for 15-20 minutes, or until the crust is golden brown.
Remove the calzone from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes before slicing and serving.
